description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by several mature trees on a grassy plot. The exterior features a dark gray facade with large rectangular windows and a flat roof, which includes a blue-tiled rooftop pool and a small terrace area with outdoor furniture. The front of the house has a simple entryway with a white door and a small paved path leading up to it. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary look, and the house is set back from the street by a green lawn. The rear of the house is more private, with fewer windows and a small potted plant near the base. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a dark gray facade, large windows, a rooftop pool, and surrounded by mature trees on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the rooftop pool and terrace partially visible behind the trees.
description_view_1: Side view with the rooftop pool and terrace more prominent, and the house partially obscured by trees.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, blue pool, and minimal window arrangement with a potted plant at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view dominated by dense tree coverage, with the rooftop pool and terrace just visible above the foliage.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no porch, flush with the facade, and a small paved path leading to the entrance.
